title: Who can add members to our monday.com account
excerpt: I’m trying to understand who can add members to our monday.com account thereby consuming a license?  When I look at the user list extract, I see invites by non-admins.  Is there away to prevent non-admins from adding mem…

posts.author: bkskidmore (Bruce)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to understand who can add members to our monday.com account thereby consuming a license? When I look at the user list extract, I see invites by non-admins. Is there away to prevent non-admins from adding members?

Thank you
Bruce

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @bkskidmore

Only admins should be able to add users to your monday.com instance. Unless you have authorized domain option selected in the security settings.
https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/4410042934418-Who-can-invite-users-to-join-my-account This article goes into a bit more detail on this specific question
